producers.name: Development Economics Data Group
producers.role: Metadata adapted for World Bank Microdata Library

version_statement.version: Version 01 (February 2023): This metadata was downloaded from the UNHCR catalog (https://microdata.unhcr.org/index.php/home) and it is identical to UNHCR version (UNHCR_RBA_2022_AH_v2.1). The following two metadata fields were edited - Document ID and Survey ID.

title_statement.title: Survey on Abandoned Houses of Refugees and Migrants from Venezuela 2022

version_statement.version: Version 2.1: Edited, cleaned and anonymised data.

study_info.abstract:
The main purpose of the regional survey on abandoned housing and housing at risk of abandonment in Venezuela was to identify the quality of tenure, current situation of the abandoned properties as well as the access to HLP (housing, land and property) rights in host countries with the aim of understanding the magnitude of the impact on their rights to adequate housing. It also aimed to identify most affected population groups.

The survey aimed to characterize the dwellings abandoned by this population along with the most frequent circumstances and typologies of this abandonment. The survey also sought to characterize the housing situation faced by this population in the host countries using differential approaches.
study_info.geog_coverage: Colombia (Antioquia, Arauca, Bogotá y Región, Cesar, Costa Caribe, La Guajira, Nariño, Norte de Santander, Santander, Valle del Cauca), Ecuador (Ambato, Cuenca, Esmeraldas, Guayaquil, Huaquillas, Ibarra, Lago Agrio, Manta, Quito, Tulcán), Peru (Arequipa, Tacna, Tumbes).
study_info.notes:
The scope of the survey includes:
- household demographics
- information on abandoned houses or at risk of being abandoned
- causes of abandonment or risk of abandonment
- perception of risks of dispossession of housing
- protection and prevention measures against abandonment of housing

data_collection.research_instrument:
The questionnaire contained the following sections: 
I. Characteristics of households and refugees and migrants from Venezuela
II. Profiling of the houses abandoned by refugees and migrants from Venezuela
III. Circumstances of abandonment of housing in Venezuela
IV. Situation of refugees and migrants in host countries

dataset_use.cit_req: R4V Regional Protection Sector (2022). Colombia, Ecuador, Peru: Survey on Abandoned Houses of Refugees and Migrants from Venezuela, 2022 (https://www.r4v.info/en/abandoned-houses). Accessed from: https://microdata.unhcr.org
